zh.lifeSummary: 當Hendrik III van Cuijk於1195年出生在荷蘭布拉班特格拉福時，他的父親Albert Hendrikz van Cuijk32歲，母親Hadewig van Merum20歲。他於大約1220年與Aleida Persijn van Putten結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他於1288年登記服兵役。他於1233年被列為heer van cuijk en grave, heer van merum en half asten。他去世於1254年在荷蘭布拉班特可享年59歲，埋葬在荷蘭努-布拉班特可。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Hendrik III van Cuijk于1195年出生在荷兰布拉班特格拉福时，他的父亲Albert Hendrikz van Cuijk32岁，母亲Hadewig van Merum20岁。他于大约1220年与Aleida Persijn van Putten结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他于1288年登记服兵役。他于1233年被列为heer van cuijk en grave, heer van merum en half asten。他去世于1254年在荷兰布拉班特可享年59岁，埋葬在荷兰努-布拉班特可。

nameMeanings.name: van
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Vietnamese Anh, Thanh, Hung, Minh, Vinh, Dung, Hue, Huong, Lan, Quang, Tan, Thuy, Hong, Chi, Hang, Ho, Pok, Sang, Bai, Chin, Ching, Chu, Chuan, Dong.
Vietnamese (Vạn): from the Chinese surname 萬, see Wan 1.
Vietnamese (Văn): from the Chinese surnames 文 or 聞, see Wen 2 and 3, and also 5 below.

variants.name: Wan
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Chinese Hong, Yi, Qi, Qiang, Wai, Yiu, Yuk, Chien-Min, Fang, Hin, Jichun, Li, Man, Chung, Min, Yiping, Pak, Sik, Sung Man.  Vietnamese Tin, Bang, Da, Hien, Hoi, Lan, Minh Quang, Sau, Tich, Tung, Yaping, Yuet.

Chinese: Mandarin form of the surname 萬, which means ‘ten thousand’ literally or ‘very great number’ figuratively: (i) from the personal name of Bi Wan (畢萬), an official in the state of Jin (located in present-day Shanxi province). He was said to be a descendant of Bi Gong Gao (known as Duke of Bi), the 15th son of the virtuous King Wen of Zhou (reined 1152–1056  BC ). Bi Wan was later granted the fiefdom of Wei (魏), which in 403  BC  became the state of Wei (located in present-day Shanxi, Shaanxi, Henan and Hebei provinces). Some of his descendants adopted Wei (魏) as their surname, while others inherited 萬 (Wan), his personal name, as their surname. (ii) from the personal name Wan (萬), style name of Rui Bo (芮伯, the Earl of Rui), an official of the Western Zhou dynasty (1046–771  BC ), who was granted the fief Rui (located in Ruicheng in Shaanxi province). Some of his descendants inherited Rui (芮), the name of the fief, as their surname, while others inherited 萬 (Wan), his style name, as their surname. (iii) from the placename Wan (萬), the name of a fief (located in Juxian in Shandong province) granted during the Spring and Autumn period (770–476  BC ) to an official in the ancient state of Chu. (iv) from the first element of the name of the Wan Si (萬俟) family, who lived in the downstream areas of the Yellow River during the Northern Qi dynasty (550–577  AD ). (v) from the second element of the name of the Tu Wan (吐萬) family, who are members of the Xianbei ethnic group in northern China.

Chinese: Mandarin form of the surname 完, meaning ‘complete’ in Chinese: (i) said to be borne by the descendants of Huan Zhui, a grandson of the Duke Huan of Song (ruler of the state of Song, died 651  BC ). (ii) from Wan (完), the name of Qu Wan (屈完), an official in the state of Chu during the Spring and Autumn Period (770–476  BC ). (iii) shortened form of the compound surname Wan-Yan (完顔), a surname from minority ethnic groups such as Juchen ethnic group in ancient northern China.

nameMeanings.name: Hendrik
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Henry
meanings: A perennially popular given name, of Continental Germanic origin, from haim ‘home’ + rīc ‘power, ruler’. It was an Old French name, adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to Britain. It has been borne by eight kings of England. Not until the 17th century did the form Henry (as opposed to Harry ) become the standard vernacular form, mainly under the influence of the Latin form Henricus and French Henri.

nameMeanings.name: III
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Japanese Yuko, Aiko, Hideaki, Hiroki, Hiroyuki, Isamu, Kaoru, Katsumi, Keiichiro, Kenji, Masako, Masayuki.
Japanese: variously written, sometimes with characters used phonetically; the most probable meanings are 仁井 ‘benevolent well’, 新居 ‘new residence’, or 新井 ‘new well’. It is not common in Japan.

en.lifeSummary: When Hendrik III van Cuijk was born in 1195, in Grave, Brabant, Netherlands, his father, Albert Hendrikz van Cuijk, was 32 and his mother, Hadewig van Merum, was 20. He married Aleida Persijn van Putten about 1220. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 2 daughters. He registered for military service in 1288. In 1233, his occupation is listed as heer van cuijk en grave, heer van merum en half asten. He died in 1254, in Cuijk, Brabant, Netherlands, at the age of 59, and was buried in Cuijk, North Brabant, Netherlands.

fr.Grave, Land van Cuijk, North Brabant, Ne: Grave, Land van Cuijk, Brabant-septentrional, Pays-Bas
fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Hendrik III van Cuijk est né en 1195, à Grave, Brabant, Pays-Bas, son père, Albert Hendrikz van Cuijk, avait 32 ans et sa mère, Hadewig van Merum, avait 20 ans. Il a épousé Aleida Persijn van Putten environ 1220. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 2 filles. Il s'est inscrite au service militaire en 1288. En 1233, sa profession de son indiquée est heer van cuijk en grave, heer van merum en half asten. Il est décédé en 1254, à Cuijk, Brabant, Pays-Bas, à l’âge de 59 ans, et a été enterré à Cuijk, Brabant-septentrional, Pays-Bas.

de.Grave, Land van Cuijk, North Brabant, Ne: Grave, Land van Cuijk, Nord-Brabant, Niederlande
de.lifeSummary: Als Hendrik III van Cuijk 1195 in Grave, Brabant, Niederlande geboren wurde, war sein Vater Albert Hendrikz van Cuijk 32 und seine Mutter Hadewig van Merum 20. Er hat um 1220 Aleida Persijn van Putten geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 2 Töchter. Er hat sich 1288 zum Militärdienst angemeldet. 1233 ist sein Beruf als heer van cuijk en grave, heer van merum en half asten aufgeführt. Er starb 1254 im Alter von 59 Jahren in Cuijk, Brabant, Niederlande und wurde in Cuijk, Nord-Brabant, Niederlande begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Hendrik III van Cuijk è nato il nel 1195 nel Grave, Brabant, Paesi Bassi, il suo padre, Albert Hendrikz van Cuijk, aveva 32 anni e il suo madre, Hadewig van Merum, aveva 20 anni. Lui sposato Aleida Persijn van Putten circa 1220. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 2 figlie. Si è arruolato nell'esercito nel 1288. Nel 1233, la sua occupazione è indicata come heer van cuijk en grave, heer van merum en half asten. Morì nel 1254, nel Cuijk, Brabant, Paesi Bassi, all'età di 59 anni, e fu sepolto a Cuijk, Brabante settentrionale, Paesi Bassi.

ja.lifeSummary: Hendrik III van Cuijkが1195年にオランダブラバントグラブで生まれた時，父Albert Hendrikz van Cuijkは32歳，母Hadewig van Merumは20歳であった。約1220年にAleida Persijn van Puttenと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は1288年に兵役登録をした。1233年，職業はheer van cuijk en grave, heer van merum en half astenと記録されている。彼は1254年にオランダブラバントクウイジクで59歳で死去し，オランダノオルド-ブラバントクウイジクにて埋葬された。

ko.Grave, Land van Cuijk, North Brabant, Ne: 네덜란드 노르드-브라반트 랜드 버 쿠이제이크 그레이브
ko.lifeSummary: Hendrik III van Cuijk(이)가 1195년 네덜란드 브라반트 그레이브에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Albert Hendrikz van Cuijk(은)는 32세였고, 그의 어머니 Hadewig van Merum(은)는 20세였다. 그는 대략 1220년 Aleida Persijn van Putten(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1288년에 군복무를 위해 등록했다. 1233년, 그의 직업은 heer van cuijk en grave, heer van merum en half asten이었다. 그는 1254년 네덜란드 브라반트 쿠이제이크에서 59세의 나이로 사망했으며 네덜란드 노르드-브라반트 쿠이제이크에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Hendrik III van Cuijk nasceu em 1195, em Grave, Brabant, Países Baixos, seu pai, Albert Hendrikz van Cuijk, tinha 32 anos e sua mãe, Hadewig van Merum, tinha 20 anos. Ele casou-se com Aleida Persijn van Putten aproximadamente 1220. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 2 filhas. Ele alistou-se no serviço militar em 1288. Em 1233, sua profissão aparece como heer van cuijk en grave, heer van merum en half asten. Ele faleceu em 1254, em Cuijk, Brabant, Países Baixos, com 59 anos, e foi sepultado em Cuijk, Brabante do Norte, Países Baixos.

ru.Grave, Land van Cuijk, North Brabant, Ne: грав, ланд ван куиджк, нурд-брабант, Нидерланды
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Hendrik III van Cuijk родился в 1195 г. в местности грав, брабант, Нидерланды, его отцу по имени Albert Hendrikz van Cuijk было 32 года, а матери, которую звали Hadewig van Merum, 20. Он женился на женщине по имени Aleida Persijn van Putten около 1220 г. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 2 дочери. В 1288 году он поступил на военную службу. В 1233 годуработал по профессии heer van cuijk en grave, heer van merum en half asten. Он умер в 1254 г. в местности куиджк, брабант, Нидерланды в возрасте 59 лет и был похоронен в местности куиджк, нурд-брабант, Нидерланды.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Hendrik III van Cuijk nació en 1195, en Grave, Brabant, Países Bajos, su papá, Albert Hendrikz van Cuijk, tenía 32 años y su mamá, Hadewig van Merum, tenía 20 años. Se casó con Aleida Persijn van Putten aproximadamente 1220. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 2 hijas. Se enlistó en el ejército en 1288. En 1233, su ocupación registrada era heer van cuijk en grave, heer van merum en half asten. Murió en 1254, en Cuijk, Brabant, Países Bajos, a la edad de 59 años, y fue sepultado en Cuijk, Brabante del Norte, Países Bajos.
